questionText: Does your organization's board have competency on environmental issues?
questionKo: 귀사에 환경이슈에 대한 전문성을 가진 이사회 멤버가 있습니까 ?
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Transitioning a business for success in a sustainable future requires environmental competency within its decision-making bodies. This capability at board-level and commitment to maintaining high levels of competency signals an organization's commitment to understanding and responding to environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to column 1 "Board of directors or equivalent governing body" of 4.1.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "예" in response to 열 1 "이사회 of directors 또는 equivalent governing body" of 4.1.

guidance.text:
General 
Consider whether your board is regularly educated and informed on environmental issues and/or whether your board has at least one individual with environmental expertise, integrating this into discussions and decision-making.
Board level competency on this environmental issue (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if the board and/or board committees have competency on the environmental issue in column 0. See the "Explanation of terms" for a definition of board competency (on environmental issues). In practical terms, it refers to the collective knowledge and understanding of the environmental issue in column 0 and the ability to engage/act/respond effectively on the related dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities as one cohesive deliberative body.
Mechanisms to maintain an environmentally competent board (column 2) 
This column is only presented if "Yes" is selected in column 1 "Board-level competency on this environmental issue".
Select all the mechanisms that apply to achieve and/or maintain the board's competence on the environmental issue in column 0. 
If none of the mechanisms are applicable to your organization, select "Other, please specify" to provide the mechanism used to maintain competency.
Environmental expertise of the board member (column 3) 
This column only appears if "Having at least one board member with expertise on this environmental issue" is selected in column 2.
Select all the types of expertise that apply to the individual on your board with environmental expertise. Consider any academic qualifications, training, experience, or other types of expertise relating to environmental issues present across your board.
If there is more than one person with expertise, organizations should respond based on the board member with the highest level of expertise. i.e., the board member to which the most academic, additional training, and experience options apply.
If you selected any "Academic" or "Additional training" response option, detail the specific expertise through the "Please specify" text field. For example, if you selected "Undergraduate education" you may specify "BSc Climate science".
If none of the criteria are applicable to your organization, select "Other, please specify" to provide the environmental expertise of the board member.
Primary reason for no board-level competency on environmental issues (column 4) 
This column is only presented if one of the "No" options is selected in column 1 "Board-level competency on this environmental issue".
Select the primary reason as to why there is no board-level competence on the environmental issues in column 0 in your organization.
Explain why your organization does not have a board with competence on this environmental issue (column 5) 
This column is only presented if one of the "No" options is selected in column 1 "Board-level competency on this environmental issue".
If you selected "Judged to be unimportant or not relevant" in column 5 "Primary reason for no board-level competency on this environmental issue", explain the criteria used to decide that board-level competence on the environmental issue from column 0 is not important or relevant for your organization.
Describe any plans to address board-level competence on environmental issues in the future, such as any measures you have implemented to enhance the competence of the board.

See the "설명 of terms" for a definition of 이사회 competency (on 환경 이슈). In practical terms, it refers to the collective knowledge 및 understanding 의 environmental issue in 열 0 및 the ability to engage/act/respond effectively on the related dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 as one cohesive deliberative body. Mechanisms to maintain an environmentally competent 이사회 (열 2) This 열 is only presented 만약 "예" is 선택 in 열 1 "이사회 수준 competency on this environmental issue". Select all the mechanisms that apply to achieve 및/또는 maintain the 이사회's competence on the environmental issue in 열 0. 만약 none 의 mechanisms are 해당되는 경우 to 귀사, select "Other, 직접 입력" to provide the mechanism used to maintain competency. Environmental expertise 의 이사회 member (열 3) This 열 only appears 만약 "Having 최소 one 이사회 member with expertise on this environmental issue" is 선택 in 열 2. Select all the types of expertise that apply to the individual on your 이사회 with environmental expertise. Consider 하나 이상 academic qualifications, training, experience, 또는 other types of expertise relating to 환경 이슈 present across your 이사회. 만약 there is more than one person with expertise, organizations 해야 합니다 respond based on the 이사회 member with the highest level of expertise. i.e., the 이사회 member to which the most academic, additional training, 및 experience options apply. 만약 you 선택 하나 이상 "Academic" 또는 "Additional training" response option, detail the specific expertise through the "직접 입력" text field. For example, 만약 you 선택 "Undergraduate education" you may specify "BSc Climate science". 만약 none 의 기준 are 해당되는 경우 to 귀사, select "Other, 직접 입력" to provide the environmental expertise 의 이사회 member. 주된 이유 for no 이사회 수준 competency on 환경 이슈 (열 4) This 열 is only presented 만약 one 의 "No" options is 선택 in 열 1 "이사회 수준 competency on this environmental issue". Select the 주된 이유 as to why there is no 이사회 수준 competence on the 환경 이슈 in 열 0 in 귀사. 그 이유를 설명 귀사 does not have a 이사회 with competence on this environmental issue (열 5) This 열 is only presented 만약 one 의 "No" options is 선택 in 열 1 "이사회 수준 competency on this environmental issue". 만약 you 선택 "Judged to be unimportant 또는 not 관련" in 열 5 "주된 이유 for no 이사회 수준 competency on this environmental issue", explain the 기준 used to decide that 이사회 수준 competence on the environmental issue from 열 0 is not important 또는 관련 for 귀사. 설명 하나 이상 plans to address 이사회 수준 competence on 환경 이슈 in the future, such as 하나 이상 measures you have implemented to enhance the competence 의 이사회.

guidance.text:
The organization has an environmentally competent board and ensures that competency is enabled through:
Integrating knowledge of environmental issues into the board nominating process.
Educating all directors on environmental issues.
Engaging regularly with external stakeholders and experts on environmental issues.
Establishing a permanent, independent, subject-expert working group that advises on environmental issues regularly.
Having at least one board member with expertise on environmental issues.
guidance.textKo: The organization has an environmentally competent 이사회 및 ensures that competency is enabled through: Integrating knowledge of 환경 이슈 into the 이사회 nominating 프로세스. Educating all directors on 환경 이슈. Engaging regularly with external 이해관계자 및 experts on 환경 이슈. Establishing a permanent, independent, subject-expert working group that advises on 환경 이슈 regularly. Having 최소 one 이사회 member with expertise on 환경 이슈.

guidance.text:
Board-level competency (on environmental issues): refers to the collective knowledge and understanding of environmental issues and the ability to engage/act/respond effectively on the related dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities as one cohesive deliberative body. An environmentally competent board is regularly educated and informed on environmental issues, integrates environmental considerations into wider board discussions and functions, and could have a board member with relevant environmental expertise (adapted from Ceres, 2017 ). 
Environmental expertise: refers to the knowledge or skills on environmental processes and issues acquired through relevant academic qualifications, training, and experience.
guidance.textKo: 이사회 수준 competency (on 환경 이슈): refers to the collective knowledge 및 understanding of 환경 이슈 및 the ability to engage/act/respond effectively on the related dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 as one cohesive deliberative body. An environmentally competent 이사회 is regularly educated 및 informed on 환경 이슈, integrates environmental considerations into wider 이사회 discussions 및 functions, 및 could have a 이사회 member with 관련 environmental expertise (adapted from Ceres, 2017). Environmental expertise: refers to the knowledge 또는 skills on environmental 프로세스es 및 issues acquired through 관련 academic qualifications, training, 및 experience.

simpleHelpKo: Transitioning a business for success in a sustainable future requires environmental competency within its decision-making bodies. This capability at 이사회 수준 및 commitment to maintaining high levels of competency signals an 조직의 commitment to understanding 및 responding to 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회.
